content.json:
# Security Compliance & Operations Dashboard
---

This dashboard provides comprehensive visibility into security compliance posture across multiple frameworks including NIST CSF 2.0, NIST 800-53, and CIS Controls v8. Data is automatically populated by the Security Copilot Compliance Reporting Agent and enriched with threat intelligence.

**Last Updated**: {TimeGenerated:max}

### Quick Navigation
- [Executive Summary](#executive-summary)
- [Compliance Controls](#compliance-controls)
- [Threat Intelligence](#threat-intelligence)
- [Identity & Access](#identity-access)
- [Incident Response](#incident-response)

parameters.name: Framework
parameters.query: _GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats') | distinct Framework | order by Framework asc

content.query:
union
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Identity') | extend Domain = 'Identity'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats') | extend Domain = 'Threats'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Audit') | extend Domain = 'Audit'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Network') | extend Domain = 'Network'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Vulnerabilities') | extend Domain = 'Vulnerabilities'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_DataProtection') | extend Domain = 'Data Protection')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Framework has_any ({Framework}) or '*' in ({Framework})
| where Severity in ({Severity}) or '*' in ({Severity})
| summarize
    TotalFindings = count(),
    CriticalFindings = countif(Severity == 'Critical'),
    HighFindings = countif(Severity == 'High'),
    MediumFindings = countif(Severity == 'Medium'),
    RequireRemediation = countif(RemediationRequired == 'Yes')
| extend
    ComplianceScore = round(100 - ((todouble(CriticalFindings) * 10 + todouble(HighFindings) * 5 + todouble(MediumFindings) * 2) / todouble(TotalFindings)), 2),
    RiskScore = (CriticalFindings * 10) + (HighFindings * 5) + (MediumFindings * 2)
content.title: Overall Compliance Metrics

content.query:
union
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Identity') | extend Domain = 'Identity'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats') | extend Domain = 'Threats'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Audit') | extend Domain = 'Audit'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Network') | extend Domain = 'Network'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Vulnerabilities') | extend Domain = 'Vulnerabilities'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_DataProtection') | extend Domain = 'Data Protection')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Framework has_any ({Framework}) or '*' in ({Framework})
| summarize Count = count() by Severity
| order by case(Severity == 'Critical', 1, Severity == 'High', 2, Severity == 'Medium', 3, 4)
content.title: Findings by Severity

content.query:
union
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Identity') | extend Domain = 'Identity'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats') | extend Domain = 'Threats'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Audit') | extend Domain = 'Audit'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Network') | extend Domain = 'Network'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Vulnerabilities') | extend Domain = 'Vulnerabilities'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_DataProtection') | extend Domain = 'Data Protection')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Framework has_any ({Framework}) or '*' in ({Framework})
| summarize Count = count() by Domain
| order by Count desc
content.title: Findings by Security Domain

content.query:
union
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Identity') | extend Domain = 'Identity'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats') | extend Domain = 'Threats'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Audit') | extend Domain = 'Audit')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Framework has_any ({Framework}) or '*' in ({Framework})
| extend Framework = tostring(split(Framework, '|')[0])
| summarize
    TotalControls = dcount(ControlID),
    CriticalFindings = countif(Severity == 'Critical'),
    HighFindings = countif(Severity == 'High'),
    TotalFindings = count()
    by Framework
| extend ComplianceScore = round(100 - ((todouble(CriticalFindings) * 10 + todouble(HighFindings) * 5) / todouble(TotalFindings)), 2)
| project Framework, TotalControls, TotalFindings, CriticalFindings, HighFindings, ComplianceScore
| order by ComplianceScore asc
content.title: Compliance Score by Framework

content.json:
## Threat Intelligence Dashboard
---
*Enriched by Security Copilot Threat Intelligence Briefing Agent*

content.query:
_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Framework has_any ({Framework}) or '*' in ({Framework})
| where Severity in ({Severity}) or '*' in ({Severity})
| summarize
    TotalAlerts = count(),
    CriticalAlerts = countif(Severity == 'Critical'),
    PhishingAlerts = countif(FindingType == 'Phishing Attempt'),
    MalwareDetections = countif(FindingType == 'Malware Detection'),
    DataExfiltration = countif(FindingType == 'Data Exfiltration'),
    OpenIncidents = countif(FindingType == 'Open Incident')
content.title: Threat Metrics Summary

content.query:
_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(Tactics)
| extend TacticList = split(Tactics, ',')
| mv-expand Tactic = TacticList
| summarize Count = count() by tostring(Tactic)
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 10 MITRE ATT&CK Tactics Observed

content.query:
_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by FindingType
| order by Count desc
content.title: Threat Finding Types Distribution

content.query:
_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Severity in ('Critical', 'High')
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, CompromisedEntity, Tactics, RemediationRequired, Status
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent Critical and High Severity Threats

content.query:
_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Identity')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    TotalFindings = count(),
    FailedAuthAttempts = countif(FindingType == 'Failed Authentication'),
    InactiveAccounts = countif(FindingType == 'Inactive Account'),
    MFANonCompliant = countif(FindingType == 'MFA Non-Compliance'),
    PrivilegedChanges = countif(FindingType == 'Privileged Role Change')
content.title: Identity Metrics Summary

content.query:
_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Identity')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where FindingType == 'Failed Authentication'
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, UserDisplayName, Severity, FindingDetails, RemediationRequired
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 25
content.title: Failed Authentication Attempts

content.query:
_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Identity')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where FindingType == 'MFA Non-Compliance'
| project UserPrincipalName, UserDisplayName, FindingDetails, RemediationRequired, Status
| order by UserPrincipalName asc
content.title: MFA Non-Compliant Users

content.query:
_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Audit')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by FindingType
| order by Count desc
content.title: Audit Finding Types

content.query:
_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Audit')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Severity in ('Critical', 'High')
| summarize Count = count() by InitiatedBy
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 10 Users with Critical/High Audit Findings

content.query:
_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Audit')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where FindingType in ('Configuration Change', 'Resource Deletion')
| project TimeGenerated, FindingType, Operation, InitiatedBy, ResourceAffected, Severity, RemediationRequired
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent Critical Configuration Changes

content.json:
## Control Status Matrix
---
*Compliance control coverage across all frameworks*

content.query:
union
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Identity') | extend Domain = 'Identity'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats') | extend Domain = 'Threats'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Audit') | extend Domain = 'Audit'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Network') | extend Domain = 'Network'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Vulnerabilities') | extend Domain = 'Vulnerabilities'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_DataProtection') | extend Domain = 'Data Protection')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ControlIDList = split(ControlID, '|')
| mv-expand ControlID = ControlIDList
| summarize
    TotalFindings = count(),
    CriticalFindings = countif(Severity == 'Critical'),
    HighFindings = countif(Severity == 'High'),
    LastAssessed = max(TimeGenerated),
    Domains = make_set(Domain)
    by tostring(ControlID)
| extend
    Status = case(
        CriticalFindings > 0, '❌ Failed',
        HighFindings > 0, '⚠️ Partial',
        '✅ Pass'
    ),
    RiskScore = (CriticalFindings * 10) + (HighFindings * 5)
| project ControlID, Status, TotalFindings, CriticalFindings, HighFindings, RiskScore, LastAssessed, Domains
| order by RiskScore desc, ControlID asc
content.title: Control Assessment Status

content.query:
union
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Identity') | extend Domain = 'Identity'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats') | extend Domain = 'Threats'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Audit') | extend Domain = 'Audit'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Network') | extend Domain = 'Network'),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Vulnerabilities') | extend Domain = 'Vulnerabilities')
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where RemediationRequired == 'Yes'
| summarize Count = count() by Severity, Domain
| order by Severity, Count desc
content.title: Remediation Required by Domain and Severity

content.query:
union
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Identity') | extend Domain = 'Identity', Entity = UserPrincipalName),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Threats') | extend Domain = 'Threats', Entity = CompromisedEntity),
    (_GetWatchlist('ComplianceReports_Audit') | extend Domain = 'Audit', Entity = ResourceAffected)
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where RemediationRequired == 'Yes'
| extend AgeDays = datetime_diff('day', now(), TimeGenerated)
| project TimeGenerated, Domain, FindingType, Severity, ControlID, Entity, AgeDays, Status
| order by Severity, AgeDays desc
content.title: Open Remediation Items (Aging Analysis)
